rationale: Migration cleanly removes the fakes from TestExecuteBeadHeadRevFailure and drives the failure via a real script-harness directive (`delete-file .git`) that corrupts the worktree, so the post-agent `git rev-parse HEAD` fails for real. Assertions updated from the synthetic `"disk read error"` string to `"rev-parse"`, which is stricter because it reflects the actual failing git command. Scope is confined to this one test.
